message:
chore: enhance all xf-11 beads with comprehensive implementation details

Major improvements to bead documentation:
- xf-11.1.3: Added detailed test specifications (unit, integration, E2E)
- xf-11.1.4: Added CLI help and README update specifications
- xf-11.2: Enhanced all 5 tasks with implementation code, SQL queries,
  and acceptance criteria; added E2E test script task (xf-11.2.6)
- xf-11.3: Enhanced all 5 tasks with rustyline integration details,
  session state management, and comprehensive test specs
- xf-11.4: Enhanced archive/index/db checks with specific validation
  functions and E2E test scripts
- xf-11.5: Enhanced date parser with chrono-english integration,
  expression types, and comprehensive edge case tests

All beads now include:
- Specific implementation code snippets
- SQL queries where applicable
- Logging specifications
- Acceptance criteria checklists
- E2E test scripts with detailed logging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
